title: aspidium reptans
intro: Aspidium reptans, also known as the sensitive fern, is a perennial fern native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Aspidium reptans include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Aspidium reptans include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
